uri_keywords.title: SQL Injection probe
uri_keywords.description: Detects common UNION SELECT probes in the request target.

uri_keywords.title: Boolean SQL injection probe
uri_keywords.description: Detects classic boolean-based SQL injection probes in the URI query string.

uri_keywords.title: Directory traversal URI probe
uri_keywords.description: Detects encoded or raw traversal attempts in request targets.

uri_keywords.title: phpMyAdmin exposure
uri_keywords.description: Detects requests that target phpMyAdmin paths.

uri_keywords.title: SQLi boolean probe in URI
uri_keywords.description: Detects ' or 1=1 style probes in URI query strings.

uri_keywords.title: SQLi string comparison probe in URI
uri_keywords.description: Detects ' or 'x'='x style probes in URI query strings.

uri_keywords.title: SQLi empty string comparison probe
uri_keywords.description: Detects ' or ''=' style tautology probes in URI.

uri_keywords.title: SQLi parenthesised OR injection
uri_keywords.description: Detects ') or (' style bracket injection in URI.

header_keywords.title: Known scanner user agent
header_keywords.description: Detects common offensive scanning tooling in request headers.

header_keywords.title: Nikto scanner header
header_keywords.description: Detects the Nikto scanner string in request headers.

body_keywords.title: Directory traversal payload
body_keywords.description: Detects directory traversal sequences in body data.

body_keywords.title: PowerShell encoded command
body_keywords.description: Detects PowerShell invocation attempts in request bodies.

body_keywords.title: Inline XSS payload
body_keywords.description: Detects classic inline script payloads in POST bodies.

body_keywords.title: SQLi login bypass payload
body_keywords.description: Detects classic SQLi login bypass probes in POST data.

body_keywords.title: XSS onerror event handler
body_keywords.description: Detects onerror event handler injection in POST bodies.

body_keywords.title: XSS onload event handler
body_keywords.description: Detects onload event handler injection in POST bodies.

body_keywords.title: XSS javascript URI scheme
body_keywords.description: Detects javascript: URI scheme used for XSS in POST bodies.

body_keywords.title: XSS iframe injection
body_keywords.description: Detects iframe tag injection in POST bodies.

body_keywords.title: SQLi boolean probe without quotes
body_keywords.description: Detects ' or 1=1 style SQLi probes in POST bodies.

body_keywords.title: SQLi admin bypass
body_keywords.description: Detects admin'-- style authentication bypass probes.
